scripts.check: cargo run --quiet --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml -p vize -- check && vp check src vite.config.ts vite.app.config.ts vize.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.check:fix: vp check --fix src vite.config.ts vite.app.config.ts vize.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.fmt: vp fmt --write src vite.config.ts vite.app.config.ts vize.config.ts playwright.config.ts
